safety for intimate area: Skin-friendly shaving system with hypoallergenic foil and pearl tips; includes 1mm intimate comb and rounded blade tips to protect skin.

safety for intimate area: SkinShield technology and SkinSecure technology; includes a sensitive comb attachment to prevent blades from touching skin in the groin area.
battery: 70 – 100 minutes runtime; Lithium-ion battery; 1-hour full charge; features 5-minute quick charge.

safety for intimate area: SkinFirst technology with closely spaced blades to reduce skin bulging and minimize nicks, cuts, and irritation; includes protective sensitive comb.
